overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city. The character descends from an elevated view to street level, walks past holographic advertisements, crosses a busy intersection with flying cars overhead, and continues through the cyberpunk urban environment.

transition from open sky view to street-level urban environment

agents.ego_description: descending from an elevated position to street level and beginning to walk along the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: red sports cars driving along the multi-lane road
pedestrian walking along the sidewalk in same direction

tall palm trees lining the right side of the street
distinctive spire-topped skyscraper dominating the skyline
elevated highway or monorail track running between buildings
futuristic red vehicles driving on the multi-lane road
tall ornate street lamps with multiple fixtures

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a sweeping view of the Night City skyline, showcasing the Arasaka tower and surrounding mega-structures. The camera descends from an elevated position to street level, revealing palm trees and futuristic sports cars on the road below. The character begins walking along the concrete sidewalk as the scene transitions from open sky to street-level urban environment.

events.description: approaching intersection with red traffic light
moving past bright pink holographic display creates localized lighting change

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past neon storefronts and holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead on the sidewalk
cars stopped at red traffic light

entered.detail: bright blue neon sign reading '24h STORE' on building facade
large pink holographic advertisement displaying a human figure
yellow and orange elevated tram station structure
tall building covered in digital advertising screens
small vendor stall on the left sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a commercial sidewalk lined with vibrant neon signs including a prominent '24h STORE' and pink holographic advertisements. The crowd density increases as pedestrians walk in the same direction, and the character approaches an intersection with a red traffic light. The yellow tram station becomes visible in the distance as the palm trees from the previous segment fade from view.

events.description: character steps off curb and begins crossing the street
camera tilts up to reveal flying vehicles in the sky between buildings

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane street at the crosswalk while looking up at flying vehicles overhead

notable_agents.action: flying cars hovering and moving between the skyscrapers
crowd of pedestrians crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: multiple flying cars and vehicles navigating between buildings
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines
large vertical digital billboard displaying advertisements
ground floor commercial establishments with glass fronts

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto the crosswalk and begins crossing the busy intersection, surrounded by other pedestrians. The camera tilts upward to reveal flying vehicles navigating between the towering skyscrapers. The yellow tram station shifts to the right as the character moves through the crosswalk, and new digital billboards come into view on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: inclined ramp roadway leading to upper city level

moving into shadow of overhead structures, reducing direct sunlight

purple neon sign reading 'HOTEL' on upper building level

segments.scene_description: The character transitions onto an inclined ramp roadway, walking uphill past a blue tree planter and closed storefronts with metal shutters. A red pickup truck drives up the ramp ahead, and a purple 'HOTEL' neon sign becomes visible in the distance. The lighting shifts as the character moves under overhead structures, creating more shadowed areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level pedestrian promenade with mixed architecture

wet reflective pavement indicates recent rain or cleaning

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an upper-level promenade featuring wet reflective pavement and a mix of traditional and futuristic architecture, including a distinctive Asian gate structure. Large digital billboards line the left side while pedestrians walk in opposing directions. The blue tree planter from the previous segment remains visible but shifts to the mid-ground as the character progresses toward the traditional gate.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a sweeping skyline view into the dense, neon-lit corridors of a futuristic city. It begins with a high-angle perspective of the Arasaka tower and mega-structures before gliding down to street level, where the open sky gives way to a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees and sports cars. As the character moves forward, the environment shifts into a commercial district filled with pink holographic advertisements and crowds of pedestrians, eventually leading the camera across a busy intersection where it tilts upward to reveal flying vehicles weaving between skyscrapers. The scene then transitions from the crosswalk onto an inclined ramp, passing closed storefronts and a red pickup truck as the lighting becomes more shadowed under overhead structures. Finally, the camera emerges onto an upper-level promenade with wet, reflective pavement, moving past large digital billboards toward a traditional Asian gate structure.
